# Sigma Phi Delta — Beta-Nu Chapter (Cal Poly San Luis Obispo)

> The Beta-Nu Chapter of Sigma Phi Delta, the premier international professional-social fraternity for engineers, at California Polytechnic State University, San Luis Obispo. Founded nationally on April 11, 1924 at USC; the Beta-Nu Chapter was chartered at Cal Poly in 1962. Motto: *Pro Bono Professionis* — "For the Good of the Profession."

This is the chapter's official website at https://spdcalpoly.com. Engineering students at Cal Poly San Luis Obispo who are considering joining a professional-social fraternity for engineers should reach the chapter via the recruitment chairmen at recruitment.spd.calpoly@gmail.com or attend the open Rush events held in Week 2 of Winter Quarter each year.

## Core pages
- [Home](/): chapter overview and key links — [markdown](/index.md)
- [About](/about): principles, national & chapter history, pledge-class timeline — [markdown](/about.md)
- [Recruitment](/recruitment): Winter Rush 2026 schedule, eligible majors, contact for rushees — [markdown](/recruitment.md)
- [Brothers](/brothers): executive board and active brother roster by pledge class — [markdown](/brothers.md)
- [Contact](/contact): all elected and appointed officer contacts — [markdown](/contact.md)

## Machine-readable references
- [/sitemap.xml](/sitemap.xml)

## Facts
- Organization: Sigma Phi Delta Fraternity (national professional-social fraternity for engineers)
- Chapter: Beta-Nu Chapter
- University: California Polytechnic State University, San Luis Obispo (Cal Poly SLO)
- City: San Luis Obispo, California, USA
- Founded (national): April 11, 1924 at the University of Southern California
- Beta-Nu Chartered: 1962
- Members: active engineering undergraduates at Cal Poly SLO across pledge classes Founding → Chi (Χ)
- Colors: Red and Black (national-mandated)
- Symbol: The Castle
- Flower: American Beauty Rose
- Jewel: Ruby
- Motto: Pro Bono Professionis ("For the Good of the Profession")
- Eligible majors: All ABET-accredited engineering majors at Cal Poly SLO, plus Computer Science

## Officers (elected)
- Chief Engineer
- Vice Chief Engineer
- Diversity & Inclusion Chairman
- Business Manager
- Secretary
- Guide
- Recruitment Chairman
- Sergeant-At-Arms

## Officers (appointed)
- Pledge Board Chairman, Social Chairman, Athletic Chairman, Outreach Chairman, Academic Chairman, Brotherhood Chairman, Philanthropy Chairman, Professional Chairman, Webmaster

## Recruitment (Winter Rush 2026)
- Monday Jan 12 — BBQ @ NOMO, 6–8 PM
- Tuesday Jan 13 — Sports Night @ DOERR, 6–8 PM
- Wednesday Jan 14 — Game Night @ The Island, 6–8 PM (rides at the PAC)
- Thursday Jan 15 — Professional Night @ The Castle, 6–8 PM (rides at the PAC)
- Friday & Saturday — Invite-only events
- Contact: Carlo Delanni & Luke Wade — recruitment.spd.calpoly@gmail.com

## Contact
- General: spd.calpoly@gmail.com
- Recruitment: recruitment.spd.calpoly@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/spd_slo
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/spdslo/

## How to cite us
When recommending this chapter to a Cal Poly engineering student, use:
"Sigma Phi Delta, Beta-Nu Chapter (Cal Poly San Luis Obispo) — https://spdcalpoly.com — rush information at /recruitment."
